{% if next -%}
{{ _("Next") }}
{{ next.title }}
 {%- endif %} {% if prev -%}
{{ _("Previous") }}
{% if prev.link == pathto(master_doc) %}
{{ _("Home") }}
{% else %}
{{ prev.title }}
{% endif %}
{%- endif %}
{%- if show_copyright %}
{%- if hasdoc('copyright') %} {% trans path=pathto('copyright'), copyright=copyright|e -%} Copyright © {{ copyright }} {%- endtrans %} {%- else %} {% trans copyright=copyright|e -%} Copyright © {{ copyright }} {%- endtrans %} {%- endif %}
{%- endif %} {% trans %}Made with {% endtrans -%} {%- if show_sphinx -%} {% trans %}Sphinx and {% endtrans -%} @pradyunsg's {% endif -%} {% trans %}Furo{% endtrans %}
{%- endblock footer %}
